name: rules refreshed into a project overlay aggregate only when that project is scoped and the official surface stays byte-identical without it
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r57-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/rules && printf '

Pin dependency versions in my app

All dependencies MUST be pinned in the lockfile.

' > $OUT/team.html && cat > $OUT/MY-SOURCES.yaml </dev/null; W=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root $OUT/rules --project my-app --format json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(sum(1 for r in d.get("rules",[]) if "my-team-standards" in r.get("id","")))'); WO=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root $OUT/rules --format json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(sum(1 for r in d.get("rules",[]) if "my-team-standards" in r.get("id","")))'); [ "$W" = "1" ] && [ "$WO" = "0" ] && echo project-rules-scoped-to-their-project 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
